50 FUNDAMENTALS OF ASTROLOGV
Now see if any of the planets or Lagna occupies the fateful
degree. By a reference to the longitudes of planets etc. you
will come to the conclusion that none is in a fateful degree.
Another point to be considered at a birth is the Visaghati
